meaning: 2 in the morning (02:00), 2 in the afternoon (14:00), 6 in the afternoon (18:00). Group by part of day, in chronological order.

a las 2 de la madrugada y 2 y 6 de la tarde

meaning: 2 and 3 in the morning (02:00, 03:00), 3 and 6 in the afternoon (15:00, 18:00). Group by part of day, chronological.

a las 2 y 3 de la madrugada, y 3 y 6 de la tarde

meaning: 1 in the morning (01:00), 9 in the morning (09:00), 1 in the afternoon (13:00). Chronological order — do NOT reorder to group the two 1-o'clocks.

meaning: 1 in the morning (01:00) and 1 in the afternoon (13:00) — consecutive, same value, different periods.
